input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.5.5
            TITLE: absorbent material and open collection devices (regardless of material) are prohibited in

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.5.5: Absorbent material and open collection devices (regardless of material) are prohibited in
T.5.5.5 Absorbent material and open collection devices (regardless of material) are prohibited in 
compartments containing engine, drivetrain, exhaust and fuel systems below the highest 
point on the exhaust system.

final_answer: Absorbent material and open collection devices (regardless of material) are prohibited in compartments containing engine, drivetrain, exhaust and fuel systems below the highest point on the exhaust system.
